task_completion.description: A folder named 'Ancient Wonders' is created within the 'My Places' panel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar in the application showing a new folder icon labeled 'Ancient Wonders'.

task_completion.description: The 'Great Pyramid of Giza' placemark is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog visible with Name 'Great Pyramid of Giza' and coordinates 29.9792°N, 31.1342°E (or decimal equivalent).

task_completion.description: The 'Lighthouse of Alexandria' placemark is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog visible with Name 'Lighthouse of Alexandria' and coordinates 31.2139°N, 29.8853°E (or decimal equivalent).

task_completion.description: The 'Temple of Artemis' placemark is created with the correct coordinates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'New Placemark' or 'Properties' dialog visible with Name 'Temple of Artemis' and coordinates 37.9497°N, 27.3639°E (or decimal equivalent).

task_completion.description: All three placemarks are correctly located inside the 'Ancient Wonders' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Places' sidebar showing the 'Ancient Wonders' folder expanded, containing the three placemarks (Great Pyramid, Lighthouse, Temple of Artemis).

integrity.description: The agent interacts with the map application GUI (e.g., Google Earth Pro) to create items.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the application window, menus, and dialog boxes being used.

integrity.description: The agent does not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the KML/KMZ file programmatically.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows or code editors running scripts to generate map files.

integrity.description: Coordinates are entered into the application fields manually (typing or pasting) rather than importing a pre-made file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen interacting with the coordinate input fields in the placemark properties dialog.
